summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 15 features: (1) Auth login works for GM and Owner users, (2) GET /api/submissions returns 23 total seeded submissions with work_date field populated in YYYY-MM-DD format, (3) GET /api/repeat-offenders responds to different window_days values - 30 days returns 2 crews, 90 days returns 4 crews, 240 days returns 5 crews with Critical/Warning/Watch escalation levels, (4) Overview dashboard shows work_date on submission cards, (5) Crew capture form has date picker input for work_date defaulting to today, (6) Repeat offender heatmap shows different escalation levels based on window_days (Critical for 7+ incidents, Warning for 5+, Watch for 3+), (7) Standards Library page loads with pagination (5 per page, 11 total, 3 pages).
test_credentials: Used GM (ctyler.gm@slmco.local) and Owner (sadam.owner@slmco.local) with password SLMCo2026! from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data (23 submissions across 8 months with rapid reviews for repeat offender testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 validated all requested features: (1) work_date field added to crew capture form as date picker input defaulting to today's date (2026-04-02), (2) 23 seeded submissions spread across last 8 months with work_dates from 2026-04-01 to ~242 days ago, (3) work_date displayed on Overview dashboard submission cards in format 'crew · service_type · YYYY-MM-DD', (4) work_date shown in ReviewPage submission list and detail view meta text, (5) Repeat offender endpoint responds to window_days parameter: 30 days shows 2 crews (Central Crew: Watch, South Crew: Monitor), 90 days shows 4 crews, 240 days shows 5 crews with escalation levels (Central Crew: Critical with 7 incidents, Test Crew: Warning with 6, South Crew: Warning with 5, Hardscape_Shrek: Watch with 4, North Crew: Watch with 3), (6) Heatmap shows 4 crew/issue combinations at 30 days vs 15 at 240 days, (7) Standards Library pagination works with 5 items per page (11 total, 3 pages).

submissions_work_date.work_date_populated: PASS - all submissions have work_date in YYYY-MM-DD format

repeat_offenders_window_filtering.30_fewer_than_240: PASS - 30-day window has fewer crews than 240-day
repeat_offenders_window_filtering.heatmap_levels: PASS - heatmap cells have level field

overview_dashboard_work_date.submission_cards_show_work_date: PASS - work_date visible in meta text (e.g., 'North Crew · bed edging · 2026-04-01')
